hero.description: We believe every person deserves care and attention. Our mission is to provide food and medicine to those who have been left in difficult circumstances due to Russian aggression.

about.heading: About Our Organization
about.description: Our charitable organization — GO "Spilnyi Budynok" (Joint Home) — helps Ukrainian citizens who, due to the crisis caused by Russia's war against Ukraine, cannot provide themselves with basic necessities — food and medicine.
about.goalText: To provide food for large families, low-income elderly people, and others who need assistance in difficult life circumstances due to the consequences of the war in Ukraine.
about.valuesText: We believe that supporting each other in difficult life conditions is the most important thing, especially now. Together we create a warm home for everyone.
about.who1Text: We support families with three or more children
about.who3Text: Everyone who has been left in difficult circumstances due to the war in Ukraine

impact.heading: Our Impact
impact.description: Thanks to your support, we have been able to help many people

howToHelp.heading: How You Can Help
howToHelp.description: There are many ways to join our cause and make the world a better place by caring for people
howToHelp.way1Desc: Your contribution will help us purchase food for those in need
howToHelp.way2Desc: Join our team and help people together
howToHelp.way3Desc: You can bring food to our office
howToHelp.way4Desc: Tell your friends and share on social media

donate.heading: Support Our Work
donate.description: Your support helps us continue providing assistance to those who need it
donate.qrDesc: Scan the QR code for an instant transfer via PrivatBank
donate.amount1Desc: — food for 1 day for one person
donate.transparency: We are a transparent organization. All funds are spent exclusively on purchasing food for our beneficiaries.

volunteer.heading: Become a Volunteer
volunteer.description: Join our team and help people together with us
volunteer.labelMotivation: Why do you want to volunteer? *
volunteer.placeholderExperience: E.g.: 2 years at a charitable foundation...

helpRequest.heading: Get Help
helpRequest.description: Fill out the form and we will definitely help you
helpRequest.thankYouDesc: We will review your situation and contact you shortly
helpRequest.categoryWarAffected: Affected by Russia's war against Ukraine
helpRequest.privacy: Your personal data will be processed confidentially and used exclusively for providing assistance

contact.heading: Contact
contact.description: Reach out to us — we are always happy to answer your questions

faq.heading: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Find answers to the most common questions about our organization
faq.notFound: Didn't find an answer to your question?
faq.q1: Who can receive assistance from the organization?
faq.a1: Assistance can be provided to large families, low-income elderly, single-parent families, people with disabilities, and everyone who has suffered from Russia's war against Ukraine and cannot provide themselves with food and medicine.
faq.a2: Fill out the "Get Help" form on our website, providing all the necessary information about your situation. Our team will review your application and contact you shortly to clarify the details.
faq.q3: How often can I receive help?
faq.a3: The frequency of assistance depends on your situation and the organization's available resources. Food packages are usually provided once a month, but additional support is possible in emergency cases.
faq.q4: What is included in the food package?
faq.a4: The food package includes basic food products: grains (buckwheat, rice), pasta, oil, sugar, flour, canned goods (meat, fish), tea, and if necessary — basic medicines.
faq.q5: How can I help the organization?
faq.a5: You can support us financially via bank transfer or QR code, become a volunteer, donate food, or spread information about our work on social media.
faq.a6: Yes! We always welcome new volunteers. Fill out the "Become a Volunteer" form on the website, and we will contact you to discuss the details. Volunteers help with sorting food, distributing packages, and other organizational tasks.
faq.a7: All funds are spent exclusively on purchasing food and medicine for our beneficiaries. We are a transparent organization and regularly report on the use of funds. You can request a report on our activities at any time.
faq.q8: Where is the food distribution point?
faq.a8: Our office and distribution point are located at: 26 Lesi Ukrainky Blvd, Kyiv (near "Pecherska" metro station). Distribution hours: Mon–Fri: 10:00 – 17:00, Sat: 10:00 – 14:00.
faq.q9: Are documents required to receive help?
faq.a9: At the first visit, you need to bring your passport and documents confirming your category (large family certificate, pension certificate, disability certificate, etc.).
faq.q10: How can I contact the organization?
faq.a10: You can contact us by phone +38 (068) 248-11-67, write to jointhome@ukr.net, or visit our office at 26 Lesi Ukrainky Blvd, Kyiv.

footer.tagline: A charitable organization helping people in need of food and medicine
footer.copyright: Made with love to help people © 2026

location.heading: Find Us
